vulnerabilities.title: OS Command Injection in giting
vulnerabilities.description: giting version prior to 0.0.8 allows execution of arbritary commands. The first argument `repo` of function `pull()` is executed by the package without any validation.

vulnerabilities.title: Command Injection in giting
vulnerabilities.description:
All versions of `gitting` are vulnerable to Command Injection. The package fails to sanitize input and passes it directly to an `exec` call, which may allow attackers to execute arbitrary code in the system. The `pull` function is vulnerable through the `branch` variable.


## Recommendation

No fix is currently available. Consider using an alternative package until a fix is made available.
